welcome.subtitle: Simplify your daily commute: find the offer suited to your profile, upload your documents and pay online — no appointment needed.

benefits.speed_desc: Enter your profile and usage, we'll find the most suitable offer for you.
benefits.paperless_desc: Upload your supporting documents online: everything is digital and secure.
benefits.payment_desc: Credit card, direct debit or mobile payment, with complete confidence.

welcome.banner_subtitle: The subscription process takes less than 5 minutes.

profile.title: What is your current situation?
profile.subtitle: Select the option that best describes you.

frequency.title: How often do you travel?
frequency.subtitle: This will help us suggest the most suitable subscription for your needs.

offer.title: Recommended offer for you!
offer.subtitle: Based on your criteria, here is the offer that best suits you:

navigo-annuel.name: Navigo Annual
navigo-annuel.desc: For people who travel less frequently or outside the region.

imagine-r.name: Navigo Imagine R
perks: Access to the entire Île-de-France network
Reduced fare tailored to your profile

amethyste.name: Améthyste
amethyste.desc: Reduced fare reserved for senior residents of Île-de-France.
perks: Access to the entire Île-de-France network

tst.name: TST
tst.desc: Social and Solidarity Pricing, subject to income conditions.
perks: Access to the entire Île-de-France network

liberte-plus.name: Liberté+
liberte-plus.desc: Pay only for your trips, with no commitment.

documents.title: Create your application file
documents.subtitle: We need some information to finalise your subscription.

identite.label: Identity card
identite.hint: JPG, PNG or PDF, max 5 MB

bourse.label: Scholarship certificate
bourse.hint: If you are a scholarship holder

payment.title: Secure payment
payment.subtitle: Choose your payment method to finalise your subscription.

success.title: Your subscription is now active!
success.subtitle: A summary has been sent to your email.

verification.title: One last step!
verification.subtitle: Your account is not yet activated. A new 6-character code has just been sent to your email.

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Sign up to configure your Île-de-France Mobilités Connect ID.

verification.title: Code sent!
verification.subtitle: To complete your registration, please enter the 6-character code sent to

success.title: Account verified successfully!
success.subtitle: Your profile is ready to use. You can now log in.

errors.terms_required: You must accept the terms and conditions and the privacy policy.
errors.server: Unable to reach the backend server.
errors.invalid_code: The entered code is invalid or expired.
